issue_title: fix: fixes a particular case where the tracking board doesn't load after initial onboarding
issue_body_preview:
Fixes #40.

To reproduce this bug, destroy all data and go through onboarding without selecting any templates or trackers. On the empty "Track" tab, tap "Browse Library", select a template and "Use this template". The trackers you added do not appear and we see 6 placeholders instead.

The bug s
test_description_zh:
1. 清除所有应用数据，完成初始引导流程，期间不选择任何模板或追踪器。
2. 在空白的 "Track"（追踪）标签页中，点击 "Browse Library"（浏览库）按钮。
3. 选择一个模板，然后点击 "Use this template"（使用此模板）。
4. 观察追踪面板是否正确加载并显示刚刚添加的追踪器。
expected_result_zh: 点击 "Use this template" 后，追踪面板应正确加载并显示所选模板中包含的追踪器按钮/卡片，而不是显示空白占位符。
